item.title: A Veteran’s Story of Survival
item.description: A personal account of military service and survival, reflecting on combat experiences, resilience, and the lasting impact of wartime duty.

media:content.media:title: A Veteran’s Story of Survival
media:content.media:description: A personal account of military service and survival, reflecting on combat experiences, resilience, and the lasting impact of wartime duty.

item.title: Living With the Past: A Veteran’s Story
item.description: A veteran reflects on life after service, exploring memory, healing, and how past wartime experiences continue to shape everyday life.

media:content.media:title: Living With the Past: A Veteran’s Story
media:content.media:description: A veteran reflects on life after service, exploring memory, healing, and how past wartime experiences continue to shape everyday life.

item.title: WWII Marine: Service and Duty
item.description: A World War II Marine shares a personal account of service, duty, and combat experiences during one of history’s most significant conflicts.

media:content.media:title: WWII Marine: Service and Duty
media:content.media:description: A World War II Marine shares a personal account of service, duty, and combat experiences during one of history’s most significant conflicts.

item.title: WWII Veteran Recalls VE Day
item.description: Louis Graziano reflects on Victory in Europe Day, sharing memories of celebration, relief, and the end of World War II in Europe.

media:content.media:title: WWII Veteran Recalls VE Day
media:content.media:description: Louis Graziano reflects on Victory in Europe Day, sharing memories of celebration, relief, and the end of World War II in Europe.

item.title: Meeting Bull Randleman: Michael Cudlitz
item.description: Michael Cudlitz recalls meeting William “Bull” Randleman, sharing stories from World War II service and the bond between actor and real-life soldier.

media:content.media:title: Meeting Bull Randleman: Michael Cudlitz
media:content.media:description: Michael Cudlitz recalls meeting William “Bull” Randleman, sharing stories from World War II service and the bond between actor and real-life soldier.

item.title: WWII Veteran Shares His Story
item.description: Lester Schrenk shares a personal World War II account, reflecting on service, combat experiences, and life during and after the war.

media:content.media:title: WWII Veteran Shares His Story
media:content.media:description: Lester Schrenk shares a personal World War II account, reflecting on service, combat experiences, and life during and after the war.

item.title: Andrew Card: A Moment in History
item.description: Andrew Card reflects on a defining moment in history, sharing insight into events, decision-making, and the weight of leadership under pressure.

media:content.media:title: Andrew Card: A Moment in History
media:content.media:description: Andrew Card reflects on a defining moment in history, sharing insight into events, decision-making, and the weight of leadership under pressure.

item.title: Combat’s Lasting Impact
item.description: Veterans reflect on the long-term effects of combat, exploring memory, resilience, and how wartime experiences continue to shape their lives after service.

media:content.media:title: Combat’s Lasting Impact
media:content.media:description: Veterans reflect on the long-term effects of combat, exploring memory, resilience, and how wartime experiences continue to shape their lives after service.

item.title: Utah Beach: George Ciampa’s Story
item.description: George Ciampa recounts his service during the Normandy invasion at Utah Beach, sharing firsthand memories of D-Day combat and survival.

media:content.media:title: Utah Beach: George Ciampa’s Story
media:content.media:description: George Ciampa recounts his service during the Normandy invasion at Utah Beach, sharing firsthand memories of D-Day combat and survival.

item.title: Liberation of Mauthausen Remembered
item.description: A historical reflection on the liberation of Mauthausen, sharing survivor and liberator memories from the end of World War II in Europe.

media:content.media:title: Liberation of Mauthausen Remembered
media:content.media:description: A historical reflection on the liberation of Mauthausen, sharing survivor and liberator memories from the end of World War II in Europe.

item.title: Learning About the Medal of Honor
item.description: A personal account of discovering the Medal of Honor, reflecting on its meaning, the recognition process, and the weight of receiving the nation’s highest military award.

media:content.media:title: Learning About the Medal of Honor
media:content.media:description: A personal account of discovering the Medal of Honor, reflecting on its meaning, the recognition process, and the weight of receiving the nation’s highest military award.

item.title: Mission to Stop Flight 93
item.description: A look at the events surrounding the 9/11 Flight 93 mission, focusing on the response, timeline, and actions taken during the crisis.

media:content.media:title: Mission to Stop Flight 93
media:content.media:description: A look at the events surrounding the 9/11 Flight 93 mission, focusing on the response, timeline, and actions taken during the crisis.

item.title: WWII Combat Terms Explained
item.description: A veteran reflects on World War II combat terminology, explaining battlefield language, experiences, and historical military context.

media:content.media:title: WWII Combat Terms Explained
media:content.media:description: A veteran reflects on World War II combat terminology, explaining battlefield language, experiences, and historical military context.
